title: Monitored Companies
description: Track company career pages and get alerts for new job openings.

emptySearchRequest.title: Request monitoring
emptySearchRequest.description: Paste the careers portal link and we'll review its inclusion.

requestSite.error: An error occurred while sending the request.

popup.stopQuestion: Do you want to stop receiving notifications?
popup.limitReached: You have reached the company limit for your plan.
popup.instruction: Enter keywords or roles of interest to receive alerts.
popup.keywordsHelp: Each tag can have multiple words (e.g. 'senior developer'). The job title must contain all of them, in any order.

analysis.title: AI Compatibility Analysis
analysis.description: Comparison between your resume and the selected job
analysis.emailError: Failed to send email. Please try again.
analysis.selectCurriculum: Select the resume to compare with this job:
analysis.applyQuestion: What would you like to do with the suggestions?
analysis.actionSaveAndDownloadDesc: Apply suggestions, save the resume, and generate a PDF
analysis.actionSaveOnlyDesc: Apply suggestions and save the updated resume
analysis.actionDownloadOnlyDesc: Generate a PDF with the suggestions without saving
analysis.chooseSaveMode: How would you like to save?
analysis.saveModeNewDesc: Keep the original and create a copy with the suggestions
analysis.saveModeOverwriteDesc: Replace the current resume with the applied suggestions
analysis.appliedBoth: Resume saved and PDF generated successfully!
